parsedBody.response:
Based on the data from the recent market query, the top result in the Sports category by volume is the **2026 NBA Champion** market. This market has a total volume of **$307,063,913.88**.

Below is a cross-reference of the top 10 outcomes by volume in this market, including their current Polymarket prices and probabilities:

| Team | Price | Probability | Volume |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| Indiana Pacers | 0.0005 | 0.1% | $47,833,396.86 |
| Memphis Grizzlies | 0.0015 | 0.1% | $32,161,241.41 |
| Chicago Bulls | 0.0015 | 0.1% | $20,485,374.73 |
| Charlotte Hornets | 0.0145 | 1.5% | $19,094,313.74 |
| Washington Wizards | 0.0015 | 0.1% | $17,545,247.94 |
| Brooklyn Nets | 0.0015 | 0.1% | $17,225,729.14 |
| Utah Jazz | 0.0015 | 0.1% | $16,906,127.12 |
| Sacramento Kings | 0.0005 | 0.1% | $14,908,507.64 |
| New Orleans Pelicans | 0.0015 | 0.1% | $14,335,498.15 |
| Dallas Mavericks | 0.0005 | 0.1% | $8,811,185.18 |

**Market Insights:**
*   **Arbitrage Opportunity:** The analysis indicates an arbitrage opportunity as the sum of all outcome prices is **0.9900**.
*   **Whale Signals:** The current signal is **NEUTRAL** with low confidence. While several addresses hold "extreme" conviction positions (ranging from ~$32k to ~$36k), total whale positions are balanced between "Yes" and "No" outcomes.
*   **Data Freshness:** The pricing data was last updated on March 1, 2026, at 12:35:08 UTC.

Then, compare the sportsbook implied probabilities with the Polymarket prices to identify discrepancies, as described in the 'find_cross_platform_gaps' skill documentation.
